home.lede: Isilawuli sokutholwa nokuqinisekisa se-Vortex yenethiwekhi yontanga kuya kontanga.
home.fingerprintDesc: Phina lo khiye osesidlangalaleni kuklayenti lakho le-Vortex. Yonke impendulo evela kusilawuli isayinwe ngakho - ukungafani kusho ukuthi kukhona ophazamisayo.
home.step3: Namathisela i-URL yesilawuli (ixazululwe ngokuzenzakalela nge-SNS) noma i-URL yokungena evela kule sayithi.
home.step4: Qinisekisa i-pubkey kuhlelo lwakho lokusebenza ifana nezigxivizo zeminwe ezingenhla.
home.step5: Uxhumekile. Konke okunye (uhlu lwama-node, amasiginesha) kusingathwa ngokuzenzakalelayo.
home.nodesDesc: Bonke ontanga ababhalisiwe, izisindo zabo, izindawo zokugcina, nemithombo yokuqinisekisa.
home.entriesDesc: Ama-URL e-Bootstrap amaklayenti okuqala — Cloudflare tunnel, Tor, IPFS, ngqo.
home.mirrorsDesc: Abanye ababungazi abasebenzisa lokhu okuqukethwe okusayiniwe okufanayo uma kwenzeka kubalwa.
home.securityDesc: Incazelo egcwele yalokho okuqinisekiswa ngokuyimfihlo, yini okungaqinisekisiwe, nokuthi kungani.

nodes.title: Ama-node abhalisiwe
nodes.lede: Wonke untanga umlawuli uyazi ngakho. Amaklayenti afunda lolu hlu, aqinisekise isiginesha, futhi akhethe indawo azoxhuma kuyo ngokusekelwe esisindweni. I-node entsha evaliwe ithola isisindo esingu-1.0; amanodi amadala noma angavaliwe abola abheke ku-0 ngakho ithrafikhi igelezela ukuphila, ontanga abathenjwayo kuphela.
nodes.legendDualD: Ibhaliswe nesilawuli FUTHI ivalwe ku-chain nge-Solana. Ofakazi ababili abazimele baqinisekisa ikhodi hashi.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Ibhaliswe nesilawuli HTTP. Isiginesha ifakazela ukuthi inodi ingumnikazi wokhiye wayo oyimfihlo, kodwa ubuqotho bekhodi abugxiliwe ku-chain.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Kwaziwa ngefayela lokulungisa noma inhlebo. Akukaqinisekiswa okwamanje. Phatha ngokucophelela - noma ubani angakhangisa i-pubkey kuze kufike ubufakazi.

entries.title: Ama-URL wokungena
entries.lede: Amaphuzu okuqala eklayenti elingenabo ontanga okwamanje. I-URL ngayinye yokungena iyindlela yokufinyelela isilawuli — ngomhubhe Cloudflare, Tor, IPFS isango, noma isizinda esiqondile. Kopisha noma iyiphi kuhlelo lwakho lokusebenza lwe-Vortex ekuqalisweni kokuqala.
entries.typeTunnelD: Mahhala *.trycloudflare.com ikheli. Ayikho i-akhawunti edingekayo. I-URL iyashintsha uma umhubhe uqala kabusha - phatha njenge-ephemeral.
entries.typeTorD: .ikheli lika-anyanisi, litholakala kuphela ngokuthi Tor. I-Censor-proof, ihamba kancane. Idinga Tor iklayenti noma ibhuloho.
entries.typeIpfsD: Ikhophi enekheli lokuqukethwe le-frontend emile. Inikezwe kunoma iyiphi i-IPFS isango — ayikho iseva eyodwa ezovinjwa.
entries.typeDirectD: Isizinda esijwayelekile + TLS. Eshesha kakhulu kodwa iyavimbeka ezingeni DNS/IP.

mirrors.title: Isibuko amasayithi
mirrors.lede: Ezinye izindawo ezinikeza okuqukethwe okusayiniwe ncamashi okufana nale sayithi. Iwusizo uma i-vortexx.sol ivinjiwe ku-DNS/ISP yakho. Isibuko ngasinye siyahlolwa ngezikhathi - ichashazi elinemibala libonisa umphumela wokugcina wokuphenya.
mirrors.healthyD: Kuphenywe emizuzwini engu-5 edlule futhi kwaphendula KULUNGILE. Kuphephile ukusebenzisa njengamanje. Ukubambezeleka kuboniswa ekhadini.
mirrors.unreachableD: Uphenyo lokugcina lwehlulekile — ukuxhumeka kunqatshiwe, ukuphela kwesikhathi, 5xx. Isibuko singase siphansi, sivinjwe, noma sigcwale kakhulu. Zama olandelayo.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .anyanisi mirrors ayikwazi ukuhlolwa impilo ngaphandle kommeleli wendawo Tor. Isimo asaziwa — sebenzisa isiphequluli Tor ukuze uhlole.

security.title: Imodeli yokuphepha
security.lede: Kahle kahle ukuthi yini eqinisekiswa nge-cryptographically, yini engaqinisekisiwe, nokuthi ukhiye ngamunye ohlelweni uthola kanjani - noma ulahlekelwa - ukwethenjwa kwakho. Funda lokhu ngaphambi kokuthi uxhume amaklayenti amasha kusilawuli ongazisebenzisi wena.
security.treasurySub: Isikhwama se-Solana esithola izinkokhelo zephrothokholi (izinkokhelo zokubhalisa ezivela kuma-node amasha + ukuncishiswa okungu-20% kokubhaliselwe kwe-premium) bese sisabalalisa okusele njengemiklomelo kubaqhubi abasebenzayo. Noma ubani angakwazi ukuhlola imali engenayo/ephumayo ku-chain.
security.treasury1: On-chain transparency — ikheli elingenhla liphethe §vortexx.sol ku-Solana Name Service. Konke okungenayo (izimali zokubhalisa, okubhaliselwe) nayo yonke inkokhelo yomklomelo kuwumsebenzi osayiniwe Solana — oqinisekiswa yinoma ubani, kuhlanganise nawe.
security.treasury2: Inkokhelo yokuhlukaniswa — U-70% wokubhaliselwe kwe-premium ngakunye uya endaweni yemiklomelo (kusatshalaliswa i-pro-rata kumanodi ngokusetshenziswa + nesiteki), ukuthuthukiswa okuyinhloko kwezimali okungu-20%, u-10% uyashiswa / ubanjwe njengomshwalense. Izimali zokubhalisa ubunikazi be-anchor node kanye ne-anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Caveat ye-Custody — kuze kube kusetshenziswa inkontileka ehlakaniphile yenkokhelo, umgcinimafa usebenza njengomgcini wesikhashana. Lokhu kubhalwe ngokwethembeka lapha futhi kulandelelwa esidlangalaleni. Inkontileka ehlakaniphile izongena esikhundleni sokugcinwa kwesandla ngesandla uma sekucwaningwe + izindawo zokuphatha ezisebenza ngokubambisana.
